backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop controls, configurable spread/interval/numOrders, and an activity log with pagination.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the OpenOrdersPanel and useQueries.ts cancel-all mutation refresh fix to test requirement REQ-3 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module for the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, three-row responsive grid of panels (control, config, market data, orders, history, logs), and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Panel component that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with color-coded event types, loading skeletons, error state, and an empty state message.
Bot control panel that shows running/stopped status with a pulsing indicator, displays a config summary (spread, numOrders, interval), and provides Start/Stop buttons with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving (backend config is read-only).
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a scrollable table of current grid price levels split into buy/sell sides, with a computed mid price, loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the derived mid price (ICP/ckUSDT) from the latest grid data along with a live/idle/stale/error status badge and a refresh button, updating staleness every second.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, and provides a 'Cancel All' button that triggers the cancel mutation with pending/success feedback.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays a reverse-chronological trade history table with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, and invalidates/refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, wrapping AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all trading bot backend interactions including fetching bot status/config, trade history, open orders, activity log, and mutations for start/stop/cancel operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining a terminal-themed dark design system using Tailwind and OKLCH color tokens for trading UI elements like buy/sell/running/stopped states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, terminal-style shadows, and trading-specific color utilities.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the ICDex Grid Bot app, its existing features, and pending fix requests for broken order cancellation and repositioning logic in both frontend and backend.
